description:
YCP Tennis League 4 - week 5

Rematch vs. Mycroprocessor

Have been working on this serve very slowly since January/February.

Sony Vegas 6 project file (requires Debugmode Wax (w/ Freeframe effects) + PluginPac to work properly, or else you might be seeing lots of blank parts): http://www.mediafire.com/download/wjzm7lvdd53ngje/rnd+1+vs+mycro+rematch.zip

PLEASE NOTE: because I refuse to use Google+, I don't respond to comments and questions sent through the private messaging feature! For that, I'd like you to use this e-mail address if you have any questions: ericpillmayer AT yahoo DOT de  Thank you!
